hero.title: Examples Showcase
hero.subtitle: See how NoJS directives replace boilerplate and bring layouts to life using only semantic HTML attributes.

cat1.title: State & Binding
cat1.subtitle: Reactive state management with automatic DOM updates — no manual wiring needed.

cat2.title: Conditionals & Loops
cat2.subtitle: Control rendering with declarative attributes. Show, hide, iterate, and branch — all in HTML.

cat3.title: Data Fetching
cat3.subtitle: Built-in HTTP verbs with loading states, error handling, and caching — zero boilerplate.

cat4.title: Routing & Templates
cat4.subtitle: Client-side navigation and reusable template composition without a build step.

counter.name: Simple Counter
counter.desc: Local reactive counter. Updates automatically when variables change. Pauses execution and highlights states cleanly.

binding.name: Live Input Binding
binding.desc: Bind an input to state with model and render it elsewhere with bind. Changes propagate instantly.

computed.name: Computed Values
computed.desc: Define derived values with computed and expr. They recalculate automatically when dependencies change.

search.name: Filtered Search List
search.desc: Filter array items interactively using two-way input bindings (model) and loops (foreach).

todo.name: Todo List
todo.desc: Add and remove items with foreach, on:click, and array methods. Full CRUD in pure HTML.

switchCase.name: Switch / Case
switchCase.desc: Render different content based on a value using switch, case, and default — like a native switch statement.

fetch.name: API Fetcher with Skeleton
fetch.desc: Fetch and display API data. The designated skeleton element holds layout spacing and vanishes automatically when data arrives.

formPost.name: Form Submission
formPost.desc: Submit form data with post and body. Combine with model for reactive form fields and inline validation.

pagination.name: Load More List
pagination.desc: Paginate API results with get-trigger, get-page, and get-insert. Append new items on button click.

router.name: Basic Router
router.desc: Define routes with route and render them into route-view. Active links highlight with route-active.

templates.name: Reusable Templates
templates.desc: Compose UI with use and <slot>. Pass data via state — like components, but just HTML templates.

dynamicStyles.name: Dynamic Classes & Styles
dynamicStyles.desc: Toggle classes with class-* and set inline styles with style-*. Both react to state changes automatically.
